report.title: UKSI taxon ranks for TanHub
report.description: A list of UKSI taxon ranks for TanHub.
report.query: SELECT #columns# FROM locations l JOIN cache_termlists_terms t on t.id=l.location_type_id WHERE l.deleted=false AND t.term = '#location_type#' and l.name in (#geographic_regions#)

param.name: geographic_regions
param.description: Names of the locations to include in the report, single quoted CSV.

param.name: location_type
param.description: Location type to limit the report to.
